title: FaithBreak
description: A thoughtful plugin that auto detects prayer times based on locations and gently reminds players!
body:
# 🕌 **FaithBreak v1.5.0 — Admin Controls & Configurable Breaks!** 🛡️
### 🌟 **Join Our Discord for Giveaways & Events!** 🎮 Join our **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/snkKDmc89f)** 🔗 for monthly giveaways & events where you can win coupon codes or plugins like **[AstralSwords Premium](https://builtbybit.com/resources/astral-swords.81777/)** or **[TrimBlades](https://builtbybit.com/resources/trimblades.87033/)**! 🎨🚀
--- Warriors of faith, **v1.5.0** is here with **Force Kick Mode** for server admins and a **configurable break duration**! Full admin control over prayer enforcement, plus the flexibility to set your own break time. 🚀 ---
## ✨ **What's New in v1.5.0** ✨
### 🎯 Major Improvements * **feat:** 🔒 **FORCE KICK MODE** — New config option for admins! When enabled, ALL opted-in players are kicked during prayer times — even those in Reminder Mode. Players who used `/non-muslim` are still respected. * **feat:** ⏱️ **CONFIGURABLE BREAK DURATION** — Admins can now set the prayer break length in minutes via `break-duration` in config. Minimum: 12 minutes, no upper limit! * **feat:** ⚠️ **SMART WARNINGS** — Players who try to select Reminder Mode while Force Kick is active get a clear warning that they'll still be kicked. * **fix:** 🧹 **CODE CLEANUP** — Cleaned up redundant kick logic in the non-Middle-Eastern player path for better reliability. ### 🆕 New Config Options | Option | Default | Description | |--------|---------|-------------| | `force-kick-mode` | `false` | When `true`, overrides Reminder Mode → Kick for all players | | `break-duration` | `12` | Prayer break duration in minutes (min: 12) | ---
## 📋 **Full Feature List** 📋
### 🎮 Player Modes | Mode | What Happens | Command | |------|-------------|---------| | 🔴 **Kick Mode** (Default) | Kicked from server during prayer time | `/muslim kick` | | 🟡 **Reminder Mode** | Chat reminder only — no kick! | `/muslim reminder` | | 🟢 **Opt-Out** | Nothing happens — fully opted out | `/non-muslim` | > ⚠️ If the server has **Force Kick Mode** enabled, Reminder Mode players will still be kicked. Opt-Out players are always respected. --- ## 🔍 What Does FaithBreak Do? FaithBreak helps players take breaks during prayer times: - 🌍 **Smart Location Detection**: Automatically detects each player's location based on their IP - 🕰️ **Prayer Time Awareness**: Calculates accurate prayer times for each player's specific location - ⏱️ **Timely Reminders**: Two minutes before prayer time, players are kicked or reminded - ⏳ **Configurable Break**: Kicked players can't rejoin for the configured duration (default: 12 min) - 🌐 **Multi-Language Magic**: Messages automatically appear in each player's Minecraft language! - 🎯 **Player Choice**: Choose between Kick Mode, Reminder Mode, or Opt-Out — saved permanently! - 🔒 **Admin Override**: Server admins can force kick mode globally via config --- ## 💻 Commands ### Player Commands | Command | Description | |---------|-------------| | `/muslim` | Opt in with **Kick Mode** (default) | | `/muslim kick` | Set mode to **Kick** — kicked during prayer times | | `/muslim reminder` | Set mode to **Reminder** — chat alerts only, no kick | | `/non-muslim` | **Opt out** of all prayer kicks and reminders (saved permanently!) | | `/fb lang` | View current language and available options | | `/fb lang ` | Change your language (e.g., `/fb lang ar_SA`) | ### Admin Commands (OP only) | Command | Description | |---------|-------------| | `/fb kick ` | Test the kick screen without the break timer | > 💡 **Tab Completions**: All commands support tab completion! Type `/muslim ` and press Tab to see `kick` and `reminder` suggestions. --- ## 🌍 Supported Languages (10 Total!) - 🇬🇧 **English** (en_US) - 🇸🇦 **Arabic** (ar_SA) - العربية - 🇵🇰 **Urdu** (ur_PK) - اردو - 🇪🇸 **Spanish** (es_ES) - Español - 🇫🇷 **French** (fr_FR) - Français - 🇮🇩 **Indonesian** (id_ID) - Bahasa Indonesia - 🇮🇳 **Hindi** (hi_IN) - हिन्दी - 🇩🇪 **German** (de_DE) - Deutsch - 🇵🇱 **Polish** (pl_PL) - Polski - 🇳🇱 **Dutch** (nl_NL) - Nederlands **💡 Server Owners**: Add more languages by creating `[code].yml` files in `plugins/FaithBreak/messages/`! --- ## 📋 Features in Detail ### 🔔 What Happens During Prayer Time? **For Players in Kick Mode (Default):** 1. 2 minutes before prayer → kicked from server 2. See localized message with prayer name + mode info 3. Kick screen shows how to switch to Reminder Mode or Opt-Out 4. Can rejoin after the configured break duration **For Players in Reminder Mode:** 1. 2 minutes before prayer → receive a chat reminder 2. Message: "⏰ Reminder: It's [Prayer] prayer time!" 3. No kick — keep playing! > ⚠️ If `force-kick-mode: true` is set in config, Reminder Mode players are kicked instead. **For Opted-Out Players:** - Nothing happens — fully invisible to the prayer system ### 🎮 Choosing Your Mode **Want to be kicked for prayer? (Strict enforcement)** ``` /muslim kick ``` **Want chat reminders only? (No kick)** ``` /muslim reminder ``` ### 🚫 Don't Want Prayer Notifications? Use `/non-muslim` to opt out: - You won't receive kicks or reminders - **Your choice is saved permanently!** - Switch back anytime with `/muslim` ### 🔒 Privacy First By default, FaithBreak does NOT log player locations to console: - No more "Player X location detected: Country, City" spam - Enable `log-player-locations: true` in config only if needed ### 🧪 Test Mode for Admins Want to see what players see when kicked? ``` /fb kick Fajr ``` - Shows the exact kick screen with mode info - No break timer — rejoin immediately! --- ### 📸 What Players See ### English Player (Kick Screen) ``` It's Fajr prayer time! Please take a break. You can rejoin in 12 minutes. You are in Kick Mode. Type /muslim reminder for chat-only alerts. Not Muslim? Type /non-muslim to opt out. (Your choice is saved permanently and survives restarts) Learn More: https://modrinth.com/plugin/faithbreak ``` ### English Player (Reminder Mode — Chat Message) ``` ⏰ Reminder: It's Fajr prayer time! (You are in Reminder Mode. Use /muslim kick to enable strict kicking) ``` ### English Player (Reminder Mode — Force Kick Active) ``` §aYou have opted in to §eReminder Mode§a. §c⚠ Note: The server has Force Kick Mode enabled. You will still be kicked. ``` ### Arabic Player (Kick Screen) ``` حان وقت صلاة الفجر! يرجى أخذ استراحة. يمكنك العودة بعد 12 دقيقة. You are in Kick Mode. Type /muslim reminder for chat-only alerts. Not Muslim? Type /non-muslim to opt out. (Your choice is saved permanently and survives restarts) معرفة المزيد: https://modrinth.com/plugin/faithbreak ``` ## ⚙️ Configuration ```yaml # config.yml debug-mode: false # Detailed debug logging log-player-locations: false # Log player country/city (default: OFF) # Force Kick Mode — override Reminder Mode → Kick for all players # Players who used /non-muslim (Opt-Out) are still ignored force-kick-mode: false # Prayer break duration in minutes (minimum: 12) break-duration: 12 ``` ## ❓ Frequently Asked Questions **Q: What's the difference between Kick Mode and Reminder Mode?** A: **Kick Mode** removes you from the server for the configured break duration during prayer. **Reminder Mode** sends you a chat message but lets you keep playing. **Q: What is Force Kick Mode?** A: It's a server-side config option (`force-kick-mode: true`). When enabled, ALL opted-in players are kicked — even those who chose Reminder Mode. Only `/non-muslim` players are excluded. **Q: Can I change the break duration?** A: Yes! Server admins can set `break-duration` in `config.yml` to any value ≥ 12 minutes. **Q: Will my mode choice be remembered after I log off?** A: Yes! Your mode (Kick/Reminder/Opt-Out) is saved permanently to `playerdata.yml`. **Q: I was using `/non-muslim` from the old version — will my data be lost?** A: No! FaithBreak automatically migrates your old `optout.yml` data to the new system. **Q: Is my location logged to console?** A: Not by default! Location logging is OFF unless the server admin enables `log-player-locations` in config. **Q: How do I test the kick screen?** A: Use `/fb kick Fajr` (or any prayer name) as an OP — you can rejoin immediately! **Q: I'm not Muslim, will I get kicked?** A: No! Type `/non-muslim` once to permanently opt out. **Q: Can I change the language?** A: Yes! Use `/fb lang ` to change manually, or let the plugin auto-detect from your Minecraft client. **Q: What if I'm on a VPN or local network?** A: The plugin detects local/private IPs and disables itself for those connections. **Q: How do I add a new language?** A: Copy any existing language file from `plugins/FaithBreak/messages/`, rename it, translate, and restart! --- ## 🎯 **Why Update to v1.5.0?** **If you've wanted:** - Full admin control over prayer enforcement on your server - The ability to force all players into Kick Mode globally - A configurable break duration instead of a fixed 12 minutes - Cleaner, more reliable kick logic **v1.5.0 delivers all of this!** --- ## 🙏 Why I Made This I made this plugin to help my fellow **Muslim brothers and sisters** stay on track with their **prayer times**. Let's be real — it's easy to get completely lost in Minecraft and forget 😅 This plugin gives a gentle nudge at the right moment 🕌⏰ Also, fun fact: this plugin is **automatically bundled** with every plugin I make. Check out my other creations on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/CiscoCodes)! 😉✨ ---
## ☕ Support Me on Ko-fi If you like my work, consider buying me a coffee: [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/cisocodes)
--- ## 🤝 Contributing Want to help improve FaithBreak? - 🌐 **Translate**: Add your language by creating a new `.yml` file - 🐛 **Report Bugs**: Contact me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/xpJHXywRbx) - 💡 **Suggest Features**: Share your ideas! - ⭐ **Star & Share**: Help others discover this plugin! --- ## ❓ Got questions?
Contact me on [Discord](https://discord.gg/xpJHXywRbx)
--- **Made with ❤️ for the Muslim Minecraft community** *JazakAllahu Khairan (May Allah reward you with goodness) for using FaithBreak!* 🤲
